reasoning: The strongest-argued finding in the audit. It claims the ROM's OWN prose comments (RBSOUN.MAC:89, :152) are wrong, and proves it with falsifiable arithmetic: under 'values = NUMBER' all five sounds' AUDF and AUDC chains run out together (TK 28=28, TP 40=40, BN 288=288, WP 360=360, TH 256=256); under 'NUMBER+1' all five mismatch. 5/5 exact agreement is not coincidence. Controller re-read RBSOUN.MAC:89/152/234 and the argument stands.
